title: Annual PIFSS Reconciliation
subtitle: RECONCILE COMPANY PAYROLL HISTORY AGAINST THE PIFSS AUTHORITY'S YEAR-END STATEMENT
distinction_note: This is the ANNUAL reconciliation surface. Monthly SIF generation lives under Payroll → PIFSS Submissions.

year_list.title: Fiscal Years
year_list.empty_description: Start a new fiscal year to import the PIFSS annual statement and run the compare.
year_list.new_year_prompt_description: Enter the fiscal year to begin the annual reconciliation workflow.
year_list.new_year_error_invalid: Fiscal year must be a 4-digit year between 2000 and 2100.

step1.title: Step 1 — Import authority statement
step1.description: Upload the PIFSS portal's year-end statement (CSV). The backend parses and stores it before the reconciliation compare runs.
step1.field_file_hint: CSV exported from the PIFSS authority portal.
step1.field_parser_version_hint: Select the parser matching the file format.
step1.field_portal_reference_hint: Confirmation or reference number from the PIFSS portal, for audit trail.
step1.field_file_url_hint: URL where the raw statement file is archived.
step1.placeholder_awaiting: Awaiting import by the CFO / Owner.
step1.error_file_read: Could not read the file contents.

step2.title: Step 2 — Run reconciliation
step2.description: Compare the imported PIFSS statement against the tenant's payroll history and classify variances.
step2.placeholder_awaiting: Import a statement to enable the reconciliation compare.

step3.title: Step 3 — Variance review
step3.description: Review each variance grouped by employee. Use the resolution modal to mark status with an audit note.
step3.placeholder_awaiting: Run the reconciliation to populate the variance list.
step3.empty_description: Company payroll history matches the PIFSS statement for every employee-period pair.

variance_type.company_only_description: Company recorded a contribution the PIFSS authority did not confirm.
variance_type.portal_only_description: PIFSS recorded a contribution the company did not submit.
variance_type.contribution_amount_differs_description: Both sides recorded the period but the contribution amounts differ.
variance_type.salary_base_differs_description: The basic-salary snapshot differs between company and portal.

resolution_modal.title: Resolve variance
resolution_modal.field_resolution_note_hint: Up to 2000 characters. Surfaced in the auditor report.
resolution_modal.field_reopen_reason_hint: Required when transitioning a closed variance back to unresolved.
resolution_modal.reopen_warning_owner: Reopening a closed variance is logged in the audit trail.
resolution_modal.reopen_warning_non_owner: Only the Owner can reopen a closed variance.
resolution_modal.error_reopen_reason_required: A reason is required when reopening a closed variance.

report.title: Auditor Report — PIFSS Annual Reconciliation
report.subtitle: Read-only auditor-formatted view. Intended for print / export.
report.empty_description: Run the reconciliation for this fiscal year to generate the auditor report.

toast.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
